title: Source Entity
description: Schema for validating source.md YAML frontmatter after entity creation. Sources represent research materials discovered during query execution.

tags.description: Classification tags including entity type and source category

dc:creator.description: Dublin Core creator field - typically 'source-creator' skill

dc:title.description: Dublin Core title field - source document title

dc:identifier.description: Dublin Core identifier - unique source ID with 8-char hash

dc:created.description: Dublin Core creation timestamp - ISO 8601 format

dc:source.description: Dublin Core source field - same as url for source entities

url.description: Source URL - must be valid HTTP/HTTPS URL or LLM scheme (llm://model-id)

domain.description: Source domain extracted from URL (or anthropic.com for LLM sources)

access_date.description: Date source was accessed - YYYY-MM-DD format

finding_refs.description: Array of wikilinks to findings that reference this source

doi.description: Digital Object Identifier for academic sources

pmid.description: PubMed ID for medical/life science sources

isbn.description: International Standard Book Number for book sources

llm_model.description: LLM model identifier for llm:// sources (e.g., claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929)

llm_knowledge_cutoff.description: Knowledge cutoff date for LLM sources in YYYY-MM format (e.g., 2025-01)
